closed_guard.title: Closed Guard
closed_guard.descriptionMarkdown:
Start in **closed guard** with posture control.

- Break posture
- Control sleeves or wrists
- Prepare your attack

scissor_sweep.title: Scissor Sweep
scissor_sweep.descriptionMarkdown:
Create angle, load opponent's weight, and execute the sweep.

1. Shin across the torso
2. Pull + chop
3. Come up on top

hip_bump_sweep.title: Hip Bump Sweep
hip_bump_sweep.descriptionMarkdown:
Sit up aggressively and bump with your hips while controlling arm/post.

This often chains well with kimura setups.

triangle_choke.title: Triangle Choke
triangle_choke.descriptionMarkdown:
Isolate one arm in, one arm out, lock the figure-four with your legs.

Adjust angle before finishing.

mount_control.title: Mount Control
mount_control.descriptionMarkdown:
Stabilize top mount.

- Knees tight
- Hands posted wisely
- Climb to high mount when possible
